description: Letter to Ḥalfon b. Berakhot (?). In a mixture of Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic. The letter is very long, but the substance seems quite short, occupying the last few lines of verso (the first page) and the first few lines of recto (the second page). The sender recounts a story that took place in his small town, involving a Gentile and the addressee's friend Abū l-Munā. The name Netanʾel b. Yeshuʿa appears three lines from the bottom of recto.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
